title: Persona 5 Royal
description: A stylish JRPG about high schoolers who lead double lives as Phantom Thieves. The music, UI, and story are all top-tier.

title: Never Let Me Go
description: A beautiful and haunting album with deeply emotional themes.

title: Kirby
description: The pink puffball from Dream Land. He's cute, powerful, and loves to eat. A true icon.
